recommendations.title: The Clique
recommendations.overview: A young girl tries to fit in with a clique of popular middle school girls after moving into the guest house of one of their homes.

recommendations.title: Once in a Lifetime
recommendations.overview: At Léon Blum High School in Créteil, France, a history teacher decides to have her weakest 10th grade class participate in a national history competition.

recommendations.title: Close to the Horizon
recommendations.overview: Jessica knows exactly what her life is supposed to look like and where it takes her. But then she meets Danny. He has a complicated past and could confuse all their plans. Jessica has to decide.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: How to Eat Fried Worms
recommendations.overview: During the first day of his new school year, a fifth grade boy squares off against a bully and winds up accepting a dare that could change the balance of power within the class.

recommendations.title: Eighth Grade
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Kayla endures the tidal wave of contemporary suburban adolescence as she makes her way through the last week of middle school — the end of her thus far disastrous eighth grade year — before she begins high school.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Teen Witch
recommendations.overview: Louise is not very popular at her highschool. Then she learns that she's descended from the witches of Salem and has inherited their powers. At first she uses them to get back at the girls and teachers who teased her and to win the heart of the hands

recommendations.title: Wish Upon a Star
recommendations.overview: A younger sister wishes to switch places with her popular older sister and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.
